title: Ashen Knight gains stats below forty HP

card.rawText: While this creature is below 40 HP, it gains Atk: +10. Hit: +10. AL: +2. SPD: +3.

plan.title: Ashen Knight gains stats below forty HP
plan.summary: Put Ashen Knight on field at 30 current HP and verify its below-40 HP stat suite.

notes: Set Ashen Knight current HP to 30 before reading stats.

steps: Set Ashen Knight as player_1 primary creature with current HP below 40.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect Hit and Atk output.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +10 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the bonus turns off once Ashen Knight is no longer below 40 HP.
riskNotes: AL is capped at 12, so base AL 10 plus 2 reaches the cap exactly.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate HP-threshold static creature stat modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
